headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Scandinavia operations

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions in a specific region directly threaten operational output and revenue realization.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences enters joint venture with a multinational manufacturer

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma faces regulatory review of automated logistics practices

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews of core logistics practices introduce potential operational friction and compliance costs.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences sees mixed results in supply chain optimization pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results from a pilot program indicate uncertainty regarding the success and scalability of the optimization effort.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
